caption_text: Long time, no posts! I’ve been cultivating my business handle- @gkdesignstudio for the past few years- and completely ignored this one. But I’m back! Hope everyone had a great Thanksgiving! #thanksgiving #turkey #mia
Today was my baby’s last day of school 😭 So proud of him! ❤️ #lastdayofschool #senior2021

How the heck did #seniorprom sneak up on me?! 😳 Wasn’t he just graduating kindergarten last week? 😭 My baby looked so handsome tonight- and Kennedy, his date/girlfriend was beautiful. I’m so proud to be this awesome guy’s mother. ❤️ #theshortone #proudmama #handsomeandbeautiful #picsround4
